application.name: eisstitch
application.brief: Combine Clipper EIS files into a single ISIS cube

description.p: This program takes a series of Clipper EIS cubes and combines them into a single unified cube with a unified ephemeris time table as well as a unified camera.
The program requires that the list of cubes provided be Clipper EIS cubes and that the cubes are in chronological order.

parameter.name: FROMLIST
parameter.brief: List of cubes to stitch together
parameter.description: The name of a file containing a list of Clipper EIS images in chronological order to be stitched together.

parameter.name: TO
parameter.brief: Output ISIS cube file for the stitched image
parameter.description: The output cube file that will contain the EIS stitched image in ISIS format.

example.description: This example demonstrates the basic workings of eisstitch and how to properly format the input information for stitching.

terminalInterface.description: This is the command line used to create the stitched output cube. The FROMLIST needs to be a newline delimited list of EIS Clipper cubes to stitch together.

image.brief: First chronological capture from an EIS image set
image.description: This is the first image in a series of images taken by the EIS Clipper WAC/NAC camera.

image.brief: Second chronological capture from an EIS image set
image.description: This is the second image in a series of images taken by the EIS Clipper WAC/NAC camera.

image.brief: Third chronological capture from an EIS image set
image.description: This is the third image in a series of images taken by the EIS Clipper WAC/NAC camera.

dataFile.description: Input list file of cubes, where each line is the full path or relative path for each cube to stitch

image.description: The sitched output from the three images above
